text: HP回復の妨害を乗り越えろ
HP回復効果の妨害を乗り越えろ！
HP回復効果の妨害を乗り越えろ！
Overcome the device preventing your HP restore!
Overcome the device preventing your HP restore!

/face2 おおっ、訓練用の装置が起動しましたね！
これは……回復効果低減の装置です！
体力回復しにくいですよー。

/face2 はーい、装置の停止を確認！
この訓練はここまでですね！

/face2 装置を止めたいのなら
周囲にある停止スイッチを押して下さい！
一個とは限りませんよー！

/face2 んー？　あれー？
停止スイッチが出るはずなんですが……
しょうがない、このまま訓練開始です！

/face2 停止スイッチは全部で$(0)個あるので
頑張って押してくださいねー！

/face2 停止スイッチはあと$(0)個です！
これも訓練、頑張って、頑張っ

/face2 Oh-hoh, the training equipment has activated!
This is... a device for mitigating healing
effects! It's going to be harder to restore HP!

/face2 Yup, confirming that the device has been
stopped! This training session is over!

/face2 If you want to stop the device, just find the
stop switch!
There could be more than one though!

/face2 Huh? That's odd! There were supposed to be
stop switches... Oh well! We'll just start the
training without 'em!

/face2 There are $(0) stop switches in total, so do
your best to push them all!

/face2 There's only $(0) stop switch left!
Remember, this is training! Keep going!
